completed_this_session: Read prompt-01.md and performed three-pass repository analysis; created docs/PARKING-implementation-plan.md as a PR-ready engineering artifact.
Created branch 'next' from main; all work on this branch.
Fixed pre-existing manifest bug: interactivity.is_enabled was false despite Block Kit buttons already being in active use.

Implemented 9 new slash commands in slack-bot/bot.py: /do-snapshot-list, /do-snapshot-delete, /do-droplet-list, /do-droplet-create, /do-droplet-power-on, /do-droplet-power-off, /do-droplet-delete, /do-droplet-resize, /do-reserved-ip-assign.
Bot improvement #1: upgraded /do-restore to show Block Kit selection buttons (up to 5 snapshots) instead of a text list when no argument given.
Bot improvement #2: added _scheduled_snapshot_loop() background asyncio task; enabled via SNAPSHOT_SCHEDULE_INTERVAL_HOURS + SNAPSHOT_SCHEDULE_CHANNEL env vars.
Bot improvement #3: added _prune_snapshots() retention engine; runs after every snapshot; configurable via SNAPSHOT_RETENTION_DAYS and/or SNAPSHOT_RETENTION_COUNT.

Added shared infrastructure: _ask_selection(), @app.action('selection_pick'), delete_snapshot(), delete_droplet(), list_ssh_keys(), list_reserved_ips(), _resolve_droplet(), _droplet_public_ip(), _snap_age_days().
Updated slack-bot/manifest.yml with all 9 new command entries and interactivity fix.
Updated .env.op.example with 5 new env var templates (scheduling + retention).
Updated docs/commands.md and slack-bot/README-slack-bot.md with full new command reference and variables table.
Added slack-bot/tests/test_bot.py — 17 unit tests, all passing (ruff lint clean, pytest 17/17).
Added pyproject.toml optional dev dependencies (pytest, pytest-asyncio).
Created docs/next-steps.md — complete 4-part deployment guide including rollback procedure.
